title: KMP — Count Pattern Occurrences
description: Given a text T and a pattern P, count how many times P appears in T (overlapping allowed).
inputSpec: First line: the text T. Second line: the pattern P.
outputSpec: The number of occurrences of P in T.

botCodes.code:
t=input();p=input()
m,n=len(t),len(p)
fail=[0]*n;j=0
for i in range(1,n):
    while j>0 and p[i]!=p[j]:j=fail[j-1]
    if p[i]==p[j]:j+=1
    fail[i]=j
cnt=j=0
for i in range(m):
    while j>0 and t[i]!=p[j]:j=fail[j-1]
    if t[i]==p[j]:j+=1
    if j==n:cnt+=1;j=fail[j-1]
print(cnt)

let()=let t=read_line() and p=read_line() in let m=String.length t and n=String.length p in let fail=Array.make n 0 in let j=ref 0 in for i=1 to n-1 do while !j>0&&p.[i]<>p.[!j] do j:=fail.(!j-1) done;if p.[i]=p.[!j] then incr j;fail.(i)<- !j done;let cnt=ref 0 in j:=0;for i=0 to m-1 do while !j>0&&t.[i]<>p.[!j] do j:=fail.(!j-1) done;if t.[i]=p.[!j] then incr j;if !j=n then(incr cnt;j:=fail.(n-1)) done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !cnt
